sentence: Your charismashout will fool everyone except the bropps, who were already counting on it.

wombos.definition: A frenemy in bro clothing — someone in your social circle who is technically your opp (opponent or rival). Close enough to hang out with, but you both know the score. 'Watch what you say around the bropps.'
A crashout that somehow radiates charisma — getting emotionally intense in a way that draws people in rather than pushing them away. People want your autograph mid-spiral.
